name: Low-Cal Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Lightly coat an 8-inch pie pan with nonstick cooking spray.
3. Combine the graham cracker crumbs and water in a food processor until moistened.
4. Press the crumbs into the bottom of the prepared pie pan, not the sides, and bake for 8 minutes.
5. In a 1-quart saucepan, combine the pudding mix and milk and cook until the mixture comes to a boil.
6. Stir in the pureed pumpkin, spices (cinnamon, nutmeg, allspice, ginger), and rum extract.
7. Pour the filling into the baked pie crust and refrigerate until set.
Each serving has approximately 89 calories, 1.4g fat, 1mg cholesterol, 0.8g fiber, and 172mg sodium.
